name: First National Bank Of Pasco
description_short: Community bank serving Pasco County, Florida since 1986, offering personal and business banking with FDIC-insured deposits and digital services.
description_long:
First National Bank of Pasco was founded in 1986 as a small-town community bank serving families and businesses in Pasco County, Florida. The institution has maintained its local roots while gradually expanding to serve customers across Tampa Bay, Florida, and beyond, without compromising its original mission of personalized, neighbor-focused service.

The bank offers a comprehensive suite of consumer and business banking services including checking and savings accounts, certificates of deposit (CDs), personal and business credit cards, mortgages, and various lending solutions. Customers can access services through physical branches, online banking, and a mobile app that includes features like mobile deposit, person-to-person payments, bill pay, debit card controls, and secure messaging. The bank also provides multi-million-dollar FDIC deposit protection through IntraFi programs (ICS and CDARS).

First National Bank of Pasco distinguishes itself through its emphasis on maintaining an entrepreneurial mindset while serving as a community partner. The bank holds a 5-star financial strength rating from BauerFinancial and an A+ accreditation from the Better Business Bureau. They actively invest in community engagement and recently reopened full-service banking at their Zephyrhills South branch, demonstrating continued commitment to local accessibility.

As a regional community bank, FNB Pasco likely offers more personalized service than national megabanks but may have fewer branches or digital features than larger institutions. The bank actively addresses fraud prevention with security alerts and maintains transparent communication about potential threats like caller ID spoofing and phishing scams. Many banks offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
services: Personal credit cards with pre-qualified offer system
Mobile app with enhanced mobile deposit
pros: 5-star financial strength rating from BauerFinancial, the nation's leading independent bank evaluator
A+ accreditation from the Better Business Bureau
Multi-million-dollar FDIC deposit protection available through IntraFi (ICS/CDARS) programs
Mobile app with enhanced features including mobile deposit, bill pay, and debit card lock/unlock
Community-focused bank with local decision-making since 1986
Recently expanded services with Zephyrhills South branch reopening
Proactive fraud prevention communication and security alerts to customers
cons: Limited branch network compared to national banks (regional presence only)
No mention of loan APR rates, fees, or credit card rewards details on homepage
Lacks information about minimum balance requirements or account maintenance fees
No evidence of advanced digital features like budgeting tools, investment services, or wealth management
Customer support limited to phone and branch visits; no clear chat or email support channels listed
best_for: Pasco County and Tampa Bay area residents seeking personalized community banking
Small business owners needing entrepreneurial-minded lenders willing to work creatively on financing
Customers prioritizing financial institution stability and safety ratings
Individuals who value local banking relationships and community involvement
diagnosis: First National Bank of Pasco is best for individuals and businesses in the Pasco County and Tampa Bay area seeking community-focused banking with proven financial stability and personalized service. Primary caveat: as a regional bank, they have limited branch locations compared to national institutions, and specific product details (APRs, fees, credit card rewards) are not readily available on their website.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
